name: GoalOS Validation Control Tower V33

routes.title: Validation Control Tower
routes.desc: Human, AGI Node, Hybrid, and Council validation authority in one visual command center.

routes.title: Validation Use Cases
routes.desc: Solved end-to-end validation playbooks for non-technical users.

routes.title: AGI Node Use Cases
routes.desc: What AGI Nodes can validate autonomously and when humans must review.

routes.title: GoalOS Mission Studio
routes.desc: Tell GoalOS what you want; generate mission contract, docket plan, and next route.

routes.title: Ask GoalOS
routes.desc: Browser-local chat window for questions and route guidance.

routes.title: Mainnet Contract Atlas
routes.desc: Learn the 48 GoalOS-created Ethereum Mainnet contracts.

routes.title: Mainnet Proof Rail
routes.desc: Understand the contract rail as an institutional proof surface.

routes.title: Contract Academy
routes.desc: A non-technical learning path for the contract system.

routes.title: Proof Run 001 Docket
routes.desc: Review repository-readiness evidence, gates, artifacts, and decision state.

routes.title: Evidence Docket Theatre
routes.desc: Convert a public-safe claim into a review-ready Evidence Docket.

routes.title: Loop → RSI State Capacity
routes.desc: Understand deterministic RSI governance and state-capacity readiness.

routes.title: Falsification Gauntlet
routes.desc: Stress claims against baselines, falsifiers, and review gates.

routes.title: Trust Boundary
routes.desc: No data, no wallet, no funds, no transaction, no production authority.

routes.title: Token Boundary
routes.desc: $AGIALPHA is public contract identification only; not available from GoalOS.

routes.title: Data Boundary
routes.desc: What not to submit and how public proof stays separate from private data.

routes.title: Site Map — All Pages
routes.desc: Complete public route map.

routes.title: Search
routes.desc: Browser-local search across the public proof surface.

routes.title: Demo Ecosystem Registry
routes.desc: All demo engines, inputs, outputs, gates, and next states.

routes.title: Site Health
routes.desc: Route inventory, missing-route checks, and boundary status.

routes.title: Capability Compounding Lab
routes.desc: See verified work become reusable capability.

routes.title: Controlled Pilot Program
routes.desc: Every serious pilot ends with a docket.

routes.title: Commercial Evidence
routes.desc: Commercial signals are counted carefully and disclosed responsibly.

routes.title: Repository Map
routes.desc: Know where the repository components live.

routes.title: Docs
routes.desc: Documentation entry point.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates the 48 Mainnet Contract Atlas
playbooks.request: Validate that the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contract learning path is complete, clear for non-technical users, claim-bounded, and routed to Mainnet Contract Atlas, Mainnet Proof Rail, and Contract Academy.
playbooks.why: AGI Node checks contract-route coverage, learning order, token boundary, route availability, and downloadable evidence.

playbooks.title: Human validates a public claim before publication
playbooks.request: Prepare human review for a high-impact public GoalOS claim before publication. Check evidence, unsupported wording, legal/financial/security posture, claim boundary, and reviewer accountability.
playbooks.why: High-impact public claims need human accountability and final judgment.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates an AI vendor or tool
playbooks.request: Evaluate an AI vendor or tool using evidence instead of marketing claims. Use AGI Node precheck for evidence structure, then human review for procurement judgment and risk.
playbooks.why: Vendor decisions affect budget, operations, data, and risk, so structure and judgment are both needed.

playbooks.title: Council validates Loop → RSI governance
playbooks.request: Prepare Architect / Validator Council review for a Loop to RSI governance packet with replay, baselines, ECI discipline, Move-37 handling, persistence gates, and dossier packaging.
playbooks.why: Recursive-improvement governance requires independent authority, not only autonomous scoring.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates token-boundary wording
playbooks.request: Validate the $AGIALPHA token boundary page: public contract identification only, not available from GoalOS, no sale, no custody, no wallet support, no investment advice.
playbooks.why: This is a deterministic wording and route-consistency check.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates a controlled pilot program
playbooks.request: Validate a controlled pilot program: bounded mission, success criteria, baseline, execution record, validator decision, follow-up status, acceptance record, and no unsupported production claim.
playbooks.why: Every serious pilot should end with a docket and human-reviewed acceptance state.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates Evidence Docket completeness
playbooks.request: Check an Evidence Docket for manifest, claims matrix, environment, baselines, proof packets, evaluator notes, selection certificate, safety ledger, replay path, and claim boundary.
playbooks.why: Docket completeness is a deterministic precheck before deeper review.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates defensive cybersecurity proof mission
playbooks.request: Validate a defensive cybersecurity proof mission for repo-owned, sandbox-only work with no external scans, no exploit execution, no malware generation, no unsafe automerge, and human review before remediation.
playbooks.why: Security-sensitive defensive work needs deterministic safety checks plus human authority.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates website route integrity
playbooks.request: Validate website route integrity: all public pages are present, no broken internal HTML links, all pages route back to Tell GoalOS, Ask GoalOS, Validation, All Pages, and Search.
playbooks.why: Route health is ideal for AGI Node validation because it is deterministic and browser-local.

playbooks.title: Human validates procurement proof record
playbooks.request: Create a proof-backed procurement review record with claims, evidence, risks, counterclaims, evaluation criteria, approval path, and rollback plan.
playbooks.why: Procurement affects budgets and obligations; human judgment is required.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates reusable capability promotion
playbooks.request: Validate whether accepted work can become reusable capability: proof history, transfer conditions, rollback target, scope, future mission fit, and capability package readiness.
playbooks.why: AGI Node checks structure; Human checks strategic reuse and claim boundaries.

playbooks.title: Council validates a Move-37 candidate
playbooks.request: Prepare Council review for a Move-37 candidate: novelty, advantage delta, reproduction, stress tests, persistence gate, baseline comparison, risk report, and dossier bundle.
playbooks.why: High novelty raises the burden of proof; it does not lower it.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates privacy and data boundary
playbooks.request: Validate privacy and data-boundary pages: no user data, no customer data, no confidential data, no private keys, no wallet, no transaction, no network call, no production authority.
playbooks.why: Boundary wording can be checked deterministically and routed to missing pages.

playbooks.title: Human audits a research or strategic claim
playbooks.request: Audit a research or strategic claim: what is claimed, what is not claimed, what evidence supports it, what baseline is missing, which risks remain, and what reviewer should decide.
playbooks.why: Research claims require judgment, uncertainty framing, and reviewer accountability.

playbooks.title: Hybrid prepares external reviewer replay
playbooks.request: Prepare an external reviewer replay packet: route, manifest, replay instructions, proof artifacts, reviewer checklist, expected decision state, and boundary notes.
playbooks.why: Replay readiness is deterministic; external acceptance requires human review.

playbooks.title: Council validates institutional promotion
playbooks.request: Prepare institutional promotion review for a proof-carrying artifact: evidence, evaluation, rollback, scope, canary, challenge window, and council decision.
playbooks.why: Promotion authority belongs to the gate, not to a persuasive claim.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates documentation completeness
playbooks.request: Validate documentation completeness: README, Start Here, Pathfinder, Registry, All Pages, Site Health, Trust Boundary, Token Boundary, and validation instructions are discoverable.
playbooks.why: Documentation coverage can be checked deterministically and routed to missing pages.

playbooks.title: Hybrid maps a strategic opportunity into a proof mission
playbooks.request: Map a strategic opportunity into a GoalOS proof mission with objective, evidence requirements, risk gates, baseline comparisons, reviewer responsibilities, and next public-safe route.
playbooks.why: AGI Node structures the proof path; Human validates strategic significance.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates Ask GoalOS routing
playbooks.request: Validate that Ask GoalOS answers common website questions from the local route map and only redirects when the user explicitly asks to open, go, show, launch, or redirect.
playbooks.why: Autonomous route assistance should be helpful without becoming a backend chatbot or data collector.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates end-to-end institution readiness
playbooks.request: Validate end-to-end institution readiness: user objective, mission contract, evidence docket, validator path, trust boundary, token boundary, proof routes, and next action.
playbooks.why: The user needs the whole journey to work, not only a single page.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates AGI Node handoff readiness
playbooks.request: Validate that the AGI Node handoff packet has objective, public-safe scope, allowed checks, forbidden actions, evidence requirements, expected artifacts, and human escalation rules.
playbooks.why: AGI Nodes need precise handoff packets to avoid vague autonomy.

playbooks.title: Human validates legal/privacy boundary posture
playbooks.request: Prepare human review of legal/privacy boundary posture: no personal data, no customer data, no confidential data, no wallet, no transaction, no investment advice, and no production authority.
playbooks.why: Legal/privacy posture is judgment-heavy and should be human-reviewed before public reliance.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates a public demo before launch
playbooks.request: Validate a public demo before launch: browser-local behavior, no forbidden APIs, clear user path, proof routes, downloads, boundary text, and no unsupported claims.
playbooks.why: AGI Node checks deterministic UX/safety; Human confirms usefulness and communication quality.

playbooks.title: Council validates RSI state-capacity claim
playbooks.request: Prepare Council review for an RSI state-capacity claim: replayability, schema-bound artifacts, baseline discipline, ECI ledger, persistence under shocks, and dossier packaging.
playbooks.why: State-capacity claims are strategic and require independent validation authority.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates proof metrics dashboard
playbooks.request: Validate that proof metrics measure proof quality, not just activity: docket completeness, validation latency, rejected claim rate, replay success, cost per accepted mission, and capability reuse count.
playbooks.why: Metrics wording and page routing can be checked deterministically.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates a partnership diligence packet
playbooks.request: Evaluate a partnership opportunity using GoalOS: claims, evidence, contradictions, risks, proof routes, reviewer responsibilities, and next decision state.
playbooks.why: AGI Node organizes evidence; Human judges strategic fit and risk.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates claim-boundary page
playbooks.request: Validate the claim-boundary page for unsupported AGI/ASI/SOTA/guaranteed-return/legal/security/production claims and route users to evidence pages instead of hype.
playbooks.why: Claim-boundary scanning is deterministic and public-safe.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates capability package readiness
playbooks.request: Check whether a capability package is ready: proof history, initiation conditions, validators, risk class, cost profile, replay path, rollback target, and future reuse plan.
playbooks.why: Reusable capability needs both structure and judgment.

playbooks.title: Council validates governance escalation
playbooks.request: Prepare governance escalation for a high-novelty or high-impact validation authority change with stop authority, independent verification, evidence, and rollback scope.
playbooks.why: Authority changes alter the institution itself and need Council review.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates reviewer replay room
playbooks.request: Validate the reviewer replay room: docket route, claims matrix, replay path, validator notes, dissent option, and verdict export.
playbooks.why: Reviewer route integrity and export completeness are deterministic checks.

playbooks.title: Hybrid validates institution onboarding
playbooks.request: Validate the new-user journey: Start Here, Mission Studio, Ask GoalOS, use-case playbooks, validation authority, contract atlas, trust boundary, and all-pages navigation.
playbooks.why: A usable institution requires a complete, friendly onboarding path.

playbooks.title: AGI Node validates no-network/no-wallet safety
playbooks.request: Validate that the public demos remain browser-local and use no fetch, XMLHttpRequest, sendBeacon, localStorage, sessionStorage, or window.ethereum.
playbooks.why: This protects the no-data/no-wallet public-alpha posture.

boundary: No user data. No user funds. No wallet. No transaction. No network call. No production authority. Human review required for high-impact outcomes.
tokenBoundary: $AGIALPHA public contract identification only. Not available from GoalOS. No sale. No custody. No wallet support. No investment, trading, legal, tax, exchange, bridge, liquidity, or regulatory advice.
